# Saleshandy — Pricing

## Email Outreach Plans

| Plan | Monthly | Annual | Active Prospects | Emails/Month | Team Members |
|------|---------|--------|-----------------|--------------|--------------|
| Outreach Starter | $25 | $300/yr | 2,000 | 6,000 | Unlimited |
| Outreach Pro | $69 | $828/yr | 30,000 | 150,000 | Unlimited |
| Outreach Scale | $139 | $1,668/yr | 60,000 | 240,000 | Unlimited |
| Outreach Scale Plus | $209 | $2,508/yr | 100,000 | 300,000 | Unlimited |

*All plans: unlimited email accounts, unlimited team members, AI-powered sequences.*
*Annual billing saves ~30%.*

## Inbox Placement Test (optional add-on)

| Plan | Monthly | Tests/Month |
|------|---------|-------------|
| Free | $0 | 2/mo |
| Starter | $34 | 120/mo |
| Pro | $69 | 250/mo |
| Scale | $139 | 600/mo |

## Dialer (optional add-on)

| Plan | Monthly | Credits/Month | Numbers |
|------|---------|---------------|---------|
| Starter | $23 | 1,000 | 1 |
| Pro | $55 | 2,500 | 3 |

## Credit / Usage Model
- Flat subscription — no per-credit charges for outreach sends
- **Active prospects = contacts in live sequences simultaneously** — this is NOT total list size; it is the concurrent sequence cap (the binding constraint)
- Unlimited email accounts and team members on all plans
- Warm-up via TrulyInbox included at no extra cost

## Sequence Math — Starter Plan
The Starter plan's two limits interact directly with sequence design:

| Sequence Steps | Max Contacts (within email cap) | Notes |
|---------------|--------------------------------|-------|
| 3-step sequence | 2,000 | 2,000 × 3 = 6,000 = exactly the monthly cap |
| 2-step sequence | 2,000 | 2,000 × 2 = 4,000 — headroom for follow-ups |
| 5-step sequence | 1,200 | 1,200 × 5 = 6,000 = monthly cap |

**Practical implication:** A 3-email sequence to the full 2,000-prospect cohort maxes out both limits simultaneously. To run a list larger than 2,000, contacts must be batched across calendar months.

**Upgrade trigger:** If the contact list exceeds 2,000 or the campaign needs >6,000 sends/month, upgrade to Pro ($69/mo, 30,000 prospects, 150,000 emails/month).

## TCO Notes
- Cheapest entry point in the category at $25/mo — viable for solo/small teams
- Unlimited team members = all SDRs covered for one flat price, unlike per-seat tools
- Active prospect limit is the key constraint — Starter at 2,000 is low for active campaigns; total list can be larger but must be sequenced in batches
- Inbox Placement Test is a useful add-on at $34/mo (120 tests) for deliverability monitoring
- For agencies: white-labelling available; flat fee covers all clients' SDRs
